name: RAG Pipeline & Deep Evaluation Agent
assumptions: Gemini text-embedding-004 for embeddings (via google-genai SDK)
Gemini LLM for 7-dimension evaluation scoring (via google-genai SDK)
tiktoken for token counting in chunker
POC scope: top 4 results evaluated, all ~15 returned
Teacher preset context serves as curriculum KB (no separate doc store)

tasks.title: Install Python deps (google-genai, trafilatura, weaviate-client, tiktoken)
tasks.acceptance: All 4 packages in dependencies, uv sync succeeds

tasks.title: Create rag/fetcher.py — content fetcher (httpx + trafilatura)
tasks.acceptance: fetch_content(url) returns clean text for HTML pages, YouTube captions, and paper abstracts

tasks.title: Create rag/chunker.py — semantic chunking (tiktoken-based)
tasks.acceptance: chunk_text(text) returns list of 300-500 token chunks with 50-token overlap, heading metadata preserved

tasks.title: Create rag/embedder.py — Gemini text-embedding-004 wrapper
tasks.acceptance: embed_texts(texts) returns list of float vectors, batch support

tasks.title: Create rag/weaviate_store.py — Weaviate upsert + query client
tasks.acceptance: ensure_collection(), upsert_chunks(), query_chunks() all functional with ResourceChunk collection

tasks.title: Create evaluation/schemas.py — DimensionScore, EvaluationResult, EvaluatedSearchResponse
tasks.acceptance: All Pydantic models defined, EvaluatedSearchResponse extends SearchResponse

tasks.title: Create evaluation/agent.py — Gemini 7-dimension scorer
tasks.acceptance: evaluate_resource(resource, chunks, preset) returns EvaluationResult with 7 dimension scores

tasks.title: Update discovery/service.py — wire RAG pipeline + evaluation into search_resources()
tasks.acceptance: search_resources() returns EvaluatedSearchResponse with evaluations for top 4, graceful degradation if Weaviate/Gemini fails

tasks.title: Update discovery/router.py + schemas.py — return EvaluatedSearchResponse
tasks.acceptance: Router returns EvaluatedSearchResponse, OpenAPI schema updated

tasks.title: Regenerate openapi.json + run bun run gen:api
tasks.acceptance: Frontend Orval hooks include evaluation types
